meta.description: MCP server with 12 tools for UK tender and bid compliance

tools.name: bidcheck
tools.description: RFP / tender compliance analyzer. Paste a procurement specification and optionally your draft response to get a structured gap analysis showing covered, partial, and missing requirements with compliance score.

spec_text.description: The procurement specification / RFP text to analyze for requirements (required, min 10 chars)

draft_text.description: Optional draft response text to check against the specification

tools.name: plaincheck
tools.description: Plain-English readability grader. Analyze business or procurement text for jargon density, sentence length, passive voice, and get a readability score with actionable suggestions.

text.description: The text to analyze for readability and plain-English quality (required, min 20 chars)

tools.name: timelinecheck
tools.description: Tender timeline extractor. Paste any tender, ITT, or RFP document and get all dates, deadlines, and milestones extracted into a structured timeline with priority ratings.

text.description: The tender/ITT/RFP document text to extract dates and deadlines from (required, min 20 chars)

tools.name: scorecheck
tools.description: Bid score simulator. Provide your RFP scoring matrix and draft response to estimate how your bid would score against each criterion, with confidence ratings and improvement tips.

matrix_text.description: The scoring matrix / evaluation criteria from the RFP (required, min 20 chars)

response_text.description: Your draft response text to evaluate against the scoring matrix (required, min 20 chars)

tools.name: obligcheck
tools.description: Contract obligation tracker. Paste a signed contract and get all ongoing obligations, reporting requirements, deadlines, and risk ratings extracted and organized.

text.description: The contract text to analyze for obligations and compliance requirements (required, min 20 chars)

tools.name: pqqcheck
tools.description: PQQ question planner. Extract every question from a Pre-Qualification Questionnaire, categorize them, and get evidence preparation suggestions for each.

text.description: The PQQ document text to extract questions from (required, min 20 chars)

profile.description: Optional company profile text to personalize evidence suggestions

tools.name: esgcheck
tools.description: ESG statement validator. Check sustainability and ESG claims against GRI, SASB, and TCFD frameworks. Flags greenwashing risks and missing metrics.

text.description: The ESG / sustainability statement text to validate (required, min 20 chars)

tools.name: bidmate
tools.description: Bid / No-Bid decision tool. Evaluate a tender opportunity against scored factors including strategic fit, competition, margin, capability, and timeline for a go/no-go recommendation.

text.description: The opportunity summary text describing the tender/bid opportunity (required, min 30 chars)

tools.name: riskcheck
tools.description: Contract risk assessor. Analyze any contract for risky clauses — onerous terms, hidden liabilities, auto-renewal traps, unfavorable indemnities, and termination risks.

text.description: The contract text to analyze for risky clauses and terms (required, min 20 chars)

tools.name: winthesis
tools.description: Win theme builder. Take evaluation criteria from an RFP and your differentiators to generate structured win themes with proof points, evidence, and narrative hooks.

text.description: The evaluation criteria from the RFP or tender (required, min 20 chars)

differentiators.description: Optional text describing your company's differentiators, strengths, and unique capabilities

tools.name: grantcheck
tools.description: Grant application checker. Compare your grant application against the grant guidelines section by section, flagging gaps and suggesting improvements.

text.description: Your grant application text to check (required, min 20 chars)

guidelines.description: Optional grant guidelines / criteria text to check the application against

tools.name: pricecheck
tools.description: Pricing schedule validator. Check your pricing schedule for anomalies, above-cap items, missing rates, arithmetic errors, and inconsistencies.

text.description: The pricing schedule text to validate (required, min 20 chars)

instructions.description: Optional pricing instructions or constraints to validate against
